Emperor Tianzuo of Liao, personal name Yelü Yanxi, courtesy name Yanning, was the ninth and last emperor of the Khitan-led Liao dynasty of China.
items.body: He succeeded his grandfather, Emperor Daozong, in 1101 and reigned until the fall of the Liao dynasty in 1125. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Using AI for creative pursuits? Moderation is key
items.body: An experiment showed AI users had the most creative ideas when they used it in moderation – not too much and not too little. Columnist David Robson puts the finding to the test, and explores what we lose when we over-rely on AI

items.hook: Erodium lebelii, sticky stork's-bill, is an annual plant in the family Geraniaceae.

items.hook: Bayeux Tapestry in 'wonderful state' after journey to London, French minister says

items.hook: The ViennaRNA Package is software, a set of standalone programs and libraries used for predicting and analysing RNA nucleic acid secondary structures.
items.body: The source code for the package is released as free and open-source software and compiled binaries are available for the operating systems Linux, macOS, and Windows. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Bronwyn Bancroft is an Aboriginal Australian artist, administrator, book illustrator, and among the first three Australian fashion designers to show their work in Paris.
items.body: She was born in Tenterfield, New South Wales, and trained in Canberra and Sydney. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.
